interventions.name: A1 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: break-it-down routines that force one large task into named smaller actions

interventions.name: A1 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: same-and-different comparisons across two similar computing tasks

interventions.name: A1 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: step-card sorting activities that stabilize order and step boundaries

interventions.name: A1 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: near-transfer prompts that ask what stays the same when the task changes slightly
